column1: # Format: CSV with header row. One wf-transcriptomes run per line.
# Use with: tjp-batch wf-transcriptomes samplesheet.csv --config base_config.yaml
# Each row submits one wf-transcriptomes run for a different experiment.
# Each experiment has its own FASTQ directory and barcode samplesheet.
# the base config and are applied to all rows.
#   sample        - experiment name (used in output directory)
#   fastq_dir     - parent directory containing barcode subdirectories (fastq_pass/)
#   sample_sheet  - EPI2ME barcode samplesheet CSV for this experiment
#   direct_rna    - true for direct RNA; false (default) for cDNA/PCR
#   wf_version    - override pipeline version (default: from base config)
# Optional: Titan integration (leave blank if not yet configured)
